Prototype
Operator
admin@example.com
Users AI Models Hub MCP

MCP Access Control

Manage AI agents and their access to your documents

Access groups define which folders agents can read or write

Name Description Folders Members Created

New Access Group

Define a named set of folders agents can access

You can assign folder access after creating the group.

Edit Access Group

Update group name or description

To change folder access, use the Folders button on the group row.

Delete Group

Delete ? All agent keys associated with this group will immediately stop working.

Manage Folder Access

Select which folders can access

Agents are named identities that can authenticate to the MCP server

Name Description Groups Created

New Agent

Create a named identity for an AI agent

Roles define which MCP tools an agent can use (1:1 mapping to tool names)

Name Description Permissions Used by

New Role

Define which MCP tools agents with this role can use

Each key grants an agent access to one group with one role

Agent Access Group Role Key Prefix Last Used

Issue Agent Key

Grant an agent access to a group with a specific role

Permissions granted:

Key Generated

Copy this key now — it won't be shown again

This is your only chance to copy this key. Once you close this dialog, the full key will no longer be accessible. Store it securely.

Agent
Group
Role

Add this to your MCP client config as the Authorization: Bearer value.

Delete Key

Delete the key for in ? The agent will immediately lose access. Issue a new key to restore access.
